apis.name: unreal.AnimationLibrary.get_num_keys
apis.description: Get the number of keys on a specific track in an animation sequence.

apis.name: unreal.AnimationLibrary.add_animation_notify_event
apis.signature: add_animation_notify_event(animation_sequence: unreal.AnimSequence, notify_class: unreal.Class, start_time: float, trigger_link_method: unreal.AnimLinkMethod = unreal.AnimLinkMethod.ABSOLUTE) -> unreal.AnimNotifyEvent
apis.description: Adds an animation notify event to the sequence.

apis.name: unreal.AnimationLibrary.get_animation_notify_events
apis.description: Returns all animation notify events in the sequence.

apis.name: unreal.LevelSequenceEditorBlueprintLibrary.get_current_level_sequence
apis.description: Get the currently opened level sequence in the sequencer editor.

apis.name: unreal.LevelSequenceEditorBlueprintLibrary.add_actors
apis.description: Add actors to the current level sequence in the sequencer editor.
